license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.sefebbn
title: Endo F3 Protocol for Deglycosylating Glycoproteins
author: Mike Gibson

steps_raw.instruction: Add up to 200 μg of glycoprotein to an Eppendorf tube. Adjust to 38 μl final volume with de-ionized water.
Add 2.0 μl of Endo F3 to the reaction. Incubate 3 hours at 37°C.Monitor cleavage by SDS-PAGE.
